title: Meter Top Trumps: which meter survives MHHS?
excerpt: A century of UK electricity meters as an interactive timeline and card game — from the spinning disc to SMETS2, and what Market-wide Half-Hourly Settlement means for each of them.

title: P442, before and after: how licence-exempt supply finally adds up
excerpt: An interactive before/after walk through BSC modification P442 — the ESNA role, half-hourly time-matching, and the EMR levies that locally-matched volumes now avoid.
